title: Youtube Poop: Phoenix Wright Faces of Evil
description:
Filming of Zelda: Faces of Evil gone totally wrong, all thanks to bored Phoenix. As the filming was a disaster, few funny outtakes were included. :P

It was a tough bite to make but it was worth it. :) Enjoy watching it! ^^

4th video is up, The-Thing http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C4lURsvxY-g , be sure to checck it out :)

Special thanks to court-records.net for basic sprites, my faithful subscribers and Youtube poopers for inspiration :)
